# PalmCare AI

> PalmCare AI turns a recorded home care visit into a proposal-ready, state-specific service contract — automatically. Record the visit; PALM writes the care plan, the billables, the visit notes, and the contract. Built for in-home care agencies, caregivers, and nurses.

Tagline: Where care meets intelligence.
Workflow: Record. Transcribe. Contract.

## What it does
- Voice-powered care assessments: record a natural conversation; AI transcribes and separates speakers (Deepgram Nova-3).
- Automatic, state-specific service contracts generated from what was actually said (50-state rules).
- Smart billing extraction and visit notes from the same recording.
- Client CRM, caregiver management, and an iOS companion app.
- HIPAA-minded: AES-256 at rest, TLS in transit, role-based access, audit trails, BAA available.

## Who it's for
Owners and administrators of in-home care agencies, plus the caregivers and nurses who do assessments. Best for agencies losing hours each week to documentation, assessments, and manual contract writing.

## Pricing (summary; full machine-readable file at /pricing.md)
- Starter: $199/mo ($1,910/yr, 20% off) — 20 assessments/mo, 5 team members, 14-day free trial
- Growth: $699/mo ($6,710/yr, 20% off) — 75 assessments/mo, 20 team members, 14-day free trial (most popular)
- Enterprise: $1,200/mo ($11,520/yr, 20% off) — unlimited assessments, unlimited team members, dedicated account manager
- 14-day free trial on Starter and Growth. Annual billing saves 20% on every plan. Subscriptions are purchased and billed via Apple In-App Purchase in the PalmCare iOS app.
- Structured pricing for agents: https://palmcareai.com/pricing.md
